description:
A self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality.

Creality Print is a self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality. It’s a practical and easy-to-use tool that can help you remote control and monitor your 3D printer and help print directly from your computer.
1. Added AI Version (Beta) with an AI-guided printing workflow for a more intuitive user experience.

2. AI now assists with model import, model validation, automatic repair, and intelligent filament mapping.

3. Added AI-powered print risk analysis, pre-print inspection, parameter recommendations, and an AI Knowledge Assistant.

4. Added Mixed Filaments to create new colors by stacking different filament layers.

5. Added support for importing color OBJ files with color clustering and automatic filament mapping.
6. Optimize the estimated printing time for single-colour models,, reducing estimation error to within 5%.

7. Upgraded the support generation algorithm with the new Validate and Repair Supports feature for improved print reliability.

8. Added Purge to Object Skeleton (Experimental) to intelligently reduce purge waste in multi-color printing.

9. Model Repair is now available on macOS and Linux for a more consistent cross-platform experience.

10. Fixed multiple issues related to stability, AI features, slicing algorithms, and device compatibility.

##https://wiki.creality.com/en/software/6-0/release-notes-7-2-0
